data.body: LANDING: all 10 LLM-Review votes are +MAX (review bot approved the whole stack, no code findings). Verified (CI) landing: 612 f32e, 613 a37b, 614 9f25, 616 a8e5, 617 d4cf = Ver+MAX. Two flaky Verified-1s BOTH in the concurrency/reconciler integration tier (concurrent-writer git race: 'git commit failed while holding lock' / 'bad tree object HEAD') — 611 (24ec) and 615 (b9c0); each PROVEN flaky because the change directly above it (612 resp. 616, superset tree) passed Verified+MAX. Posted recheck on both. Rechecks in progress. 3/10 leaves closed (ac0e/e1f2/74d9); holding further closes for bottom-up order until 611 then 615 go green.
